title: Who are Disqualified. The following persons and entities are disqualified to
content: 58 participate or engage in the recruitment and placement of seafarers for overseas 59 employment: 60 61 9 a. Travel agencies and sales agencies of airline companies; 1 2 b. Shareholders, officers, or members of the Board of Directors of any corporation or 3 partners in a partnership engaged in the business of a travel agency; 4 5 c. The applicant is an existing incorporator, director or key officer of at least five (5) 6 licensed manning agencies; 7 8 d. Corporations and partnerships, where any of its officers, members of the board or 9 partners is also an officer, member of the board or partner of a corporation or 10 partnership engaged in the business of a travel agency; 11 12 e. Individuals, partners, officers, or directors of an insurance company who make, 13 propose, or provide an insurance contract under the compulsory insurance 14 coverage for seafarers; 15 16 f. Sole proprietors, partners, officers and/or members of the Board of Directors, 17 including individuals with derogatory records, such as, but not limited to the 18 following: 19 20 1. Those convicted or against whom a probable cause is determined by a 21 competent authority for the following: 22 23 a. Illegal recruitment; 24 b. Trafficking in Persons; or 25 c. Such other crimes or offenses committed in the course of, related to, 26 or resulting from, illegal recruitment, or for crimes involving moral 27 turpitude; or 28 29 2. Those agencies whose licenses have been revoked for violation of R.A. 30 No. 11641, R.A. No. 12021, R.A. No. 8042, as amended, PD 442 (Labor 31 Code of the Philippines), as amended, or R.A. No. 9208 (Trafficking in 32 Persons Act of 2003), as amended, and their respective IRRs; 33 34 3. Those agencies whose licenses have been cancelled for violation of 35 recruitment laws and regulations. 36 37 g. Other individuals included in the list of persons with derogatory record for violation 38 of recruitment laws and regulations; and 39 40 h. Any official or employee, regardless of the status of the latter’s employment, of the 41 DMW, OWWA, DOLE, DFA, DOJ, DOH, BI, Insurance Commission (IC), NLRC, 42 NCMB, TESDA, Commission on Filipinos Overseas, NBI, Philippine National 43 Police (PNP), Civil Aviation Authority of the Philippines (CAAP), Department of 44 Transportation (DOTr), MARINA, international airport authorities, and other 45 government agencies directly involved in the implementation of R.A. No. 11641, 46 R.A. No. 8042, as amended, P.D. No. 442, as amended, and R.A. No. 9208, and/or 47 any of their relatives within the fourth civil degree of consanguinity or affinity. 48 49
